review_text: {"verdict":"CHANGES_REQUESTED","summary":"The change routes review work to Opus 4.8, adds task-profile model routing, and adds a fail-closed current-run check to the budget ledger. Most changes are coherent and tested. However, the workflow removes the Fable-5 fallback for review while README/config still name Fable-5 as the elevated tier, and the resolve_model conflict guard has a gap: an explicit --model equal to the profile model is accepted but callers cannot assert a mismatch is rejected when explicit_model matches an allowed-but-wrong model only via profile. Key concern: fail-closed run-visibility check depends on unvalidated GITHUB_RUN_ID env being populated identically to API 'id', which is plausible but unproven by the diff.","findings":[{"severity":"P2","status":"open","finding":"verify_run_budget now requires GITHUB_RUN_ID to appear as an 'id' among current_runs, but the diff never shows the workflow exporting GITHUB_RUN_ID or that the runs API returns matching integer ids for the in-progress run; if the current run is not yet listed by the API this fail-closes every review, and no test covers the happy path where the current run IS visible and passes.","status_dup":"open"},{"severity":"P2","status":"open","finding":"resolve_model treats explicit_model=None as 'no assertion' and only fails when explicit_model != profile model. A caller passing --model matching the profile silently passes, but --model choices=ALLOWED_MODELS lets a user pass elevated model with standard profile; this is caught, yet there is no test asserting standard+DEFAULT explicit is accepted, leaving the accept path unverified.","finding_note":"see finding"},{"severity":"P2","status":"open","finding":"README and config still label claude-fable-5 as 'elevated' and route advanced/insight/design profiles to it, but the actual review workflow (u1-claude-review.yml) hardcodes --model claude-opus-4-8 with no fallback. Nothing in the diff wires task_profile into the workflow, so the profile-routing feature is dead code for the only automated caller; the claimed multi-profile routing is unsupported for CI.","p":"P2"},{"severity":"P3","status":"open","finding":"invoke_claude default model changed to DEFAULT_MODEL and fallback only added for ELEVATED_MODEL; removing --fallback-model for Opus reviews means a transient Opus outage fails the review with no fallback. This may be intended fail-closed behavior but is not asserted as deliberate anywhere in the diff.","x":"1"},{"severity":"none","status":"closed","finding":"Budget-ledger current-run enforcement is covered by test_budget_denies_when_current_run_is_not_visible, and prior budget tests were updated to pass current_run_id, confirming the fail-closed deny-when-invalid-run-id path.","y":"1"},{"severity":"none","status":"closed","finding":"validate_config exact-contract test updated to reject drift on model_policy.default, preserving fail-closed config validation for the new policy shape.","z":"1"},{"severity":"none","status":"closed","finding":"Static workflow test asserts --model claude-opus-4-8 and absence of --fallback-model, matching the workflow change; tools remain empty and Read is disallowed.","w":"1"},{"severity":"P3","status":"open","finding":"current_run_id validated with regex [1-9][0-9]* then compared via str(run.get('id')); if API returns id as int this matches, but no test exercises numeric-vs-string equality for the visible-run pass, so the equality contract is unproven.","v":"1"}],"verification":["Diff proves budget check now fails closed when GITHUB_RUN_ID is missing or malformed (regex guard + test).","Diff proves resolve_model rejects explicit models conflicting with the fixed task profile (test_explicit_model_must_match_task_profile).","Diff proves the review workflow requests only claude-opus-4-8 with no fallback and no tools.","Diff proves config validation rejects drift on model_policy.default.","Diff proves task profiles map deterministically to models in the bridge library layer."],"requirement_coverage":["Model named explicitly, no implicit default: covered by workflow, config, and resolve_model.","Fail-closed budget: strengthened with current-run visibility guard.","Credential exposure: disallowed auth env retained; no new secret handling introduced.","Tests-prove-claim: partially covered; visible-run happy path and explicit-match accept path are untested."],"residual_risk":["Profile routing (advanced/insight/design -> Fable 5) is unused by the only CI caller; feature untested end-to-end in the automated path.","Run-visibility check assumes API lists the in-progress run and returns matching integer id; if not, every review fails closed, which is safe but may be operationally brittle.","Opus review path has no fallback model; transient Opus unavailability fails the review."]}
reason: Unstructured Claude output is useful feedback but can never authorize approval.
